label: Longsword
prompt_fragments: double-edged longsword, cruciform hilt, polished steel blade
hand-and-a-half grip wrapped in worn brown leather
fuller groove running two-thirds of the blade length
pommel of cast iron, slightly pitted with age

label: Battle Axe
prompt_fragments: broad single-bitted axe head, forged iron, edge-honed bright
thick ashwood haft bound with iron bands at shoulder and base
simple etched knotwork on axe cheek, worn and shallow
rough-hewn utilitarian form, no ornament below the knotwork

label: Dagger
prompt_fragments: double-edged blade, narrow taper to fine point, hand-length
crossguard of plain iron, grip of riveted bone scales
steel finish ranging from bright-edged to surface-patinated
compact and concealable, no elaborate ornament

label: Samurai Katana
prompt_fragments: single-edged curved blade, lacquer-black saya scabbard
tsuba of pierced iron, geometric wave motif
tsuka wrapped in white cotton ito over same ray-skin
burnished hamon line of tempered steel visible on blade

label: Revolver
prompt_fragments: single-action six-shooter, blued-steel barrel and frame
walnut grip panels, worn smooth at contact points
visible cylinder with loaded-cartridge brass bases
ejector rod housing on right side, front blade sight

label: Laser Pistol
prompt_fragments: compact energy sidearm, matte carbon-fibre body
emitter lens of polished synthetic crystal at muzzle
ergonomic grip of rubberised polymer, thumb safety tab
charge indicator strip along slide, deep blue gradient

label: Plasma Rifle
prompt_fragments: long-barrelled energy rifle, matte titanium-alloy receiver
plasma containment coils visible along barrel, glowing amber
modular Picatinny-style rail, reinforced polymer foregrip
cooling vents etched along barrel body, machined-sharp edges

label: Ray Gun
prompt_fragments: bulbous chrome pistol body, polished to mirror finish
flared barrel with concentric ring detailing
Bakelite grip in candy red, fin-shaped trigger guard
vacuum-tube power cell in transparent housing at grip base

label: Flintlock Musket
prompt_fragments: long smoothbore barrel of blued steel, octagonal breech section
full-length walnut stock, brass furniture at butt and trigger guard
flintlock mechanism, cock and frizzen of case-hardened iron
ramrod of turned wood slotted beneath the barrel

label: Tommy Gun
prompt_fragments: Thompson submachine gun, blued-steel receiver and barrel
drum magazine of blued metal, circular, capacity-marked
walnut pistol grip and horizontal foregrip, oil-darkened
compensator at muzzle, Cutts-style ports machined in line

label: Crossbow
prompt_fragments: heavy prod of yew wood, recurved and set in iron-shod tiller
windlass spanning mechanism of rope and iron pulleys
quarrel bolt nocked in groove, iron broadhead tip
stock of carved oak, trigger lever of wrought iron

label: War Spear
prompt_fragments: leaf-shaped iron spearhead, tapering socket, surface-pitted
long ashwood shaft, smooth-worn where hands grip
butt ferrule of iron at shaft base, blunt and ground flat
simple surface of functional iron, no ornament

label: Wuxia Jian
prompt_fragments: straight double-edged jian blade, narrow diamond cross-section
guard of cast bronze, ruyi cloud-motif lugs
hilt wrapped in red silk cord over lacquered wood
pommel of carved jade, spherical with incised dragon

label: Scrap Shotgun
prompt_fragments: sawn-off double barrel of rust-pitted blued steel
stock replaced with duct-tape-wrapped pipe section
wire-wrapped breach, improvised shell ejector of bent metal
exposed-head screws and jubilee clamps visible on assembly

label: Knight's Helm
prompt_fragments: full-face great helm, polished steel with subtle hammered facets
visor of hinged iron bars, vision slit narrow and horizontal
crest socket at crown, empty, surface-gilt at edges
mail aventail of riveted iron rings at cheek and neck

label: Power Armor Helmet
prompt_fragments: full-seal tactical helmet, carbon-composite shell, matte black
visor of polarised smart-glass, amber tint, curved wrap-around
side-mounted sensor pod, miniaturised, flush-mounted
collar seal of reinforced polymer, ribbed pressure gasket

label: Samurai Kabuto
prompt_fragments: multi-plate suji-bachi kabuto, lacquer-black iron scales
shikoro neck guard of layered lacing in white and gold
kuwagata horn mounts of gilded iron, swept forward
mabizashi peak of burnished iron, surface incised with waves

label: Gas Mask
prompt_fragments: rubberised canvas face mask, aged khaki-grey, surface cracked
twin circular eyepiece lenses of yellowed glass, metal frames
canister filter of pressed tin at snout, threaded connection
adjustable canvas straps, metal buckles oxidised to flat grey

label: Viking Shield
prompt_fragments: round shield of planked pine, hide-covered face, battle-worn
central iron boss, domed, surface-pitted with use
iron rim binding over rawhide edge, rivet-spaced
knotwork painted in woad blue and rust red, partially flaked

label: Relic Idol
prompt_fragments: carved stone figurine, dense basalt, heavily smoothed by age
stylised humanoid form, exaggerated proportions, no facial detail
surface inlaid with hammered gold leaf in geometric patterns
pedestal of worn sandstone, inscription worn to illegibility

label: Ancient Grimoire
prompt_fragments: thick tome, boards of aged leather over wood, iron clasp
pages of vellum, edges browned and warped with age
cover embossed with occult sigil, deep relief, gilded trace
spine wrapped with cord binding, frayed and stained

label: Holocron Cube
prompt_fragments: geometric cube of translucent smart-glass, palm-sized
interior lattice of micro-circuitry, glowing blue-white
facets bevelled to precise machine-cut angles, seamless
data-stream silver casing with recessed activation rune array

label: Cursed Amulet
prompt_fragments: oval pendant of tarnished silver, surface pitted and discoloured
central stone of deep viridian, clouded, light does not reflect cleanly
engraved border of interlocking skulls, worn shallow by age
suspension loop cracked and re-soldered, crude repair visible

label: Qi Talisman
prompt_fragments: folded yellow paper talisman, hand-brushed calligraphy in vermillion
ink strokes bold and precise, brush-tip flicks preserved in dried ink
folded once across centre, creased sharp and flat
small iron hole-punch at corner, red silk cord loop

label: Eldritch Totem
prompt_fragments: assembled totem of bone, driftwood, and shell, crude cord binding
central figure of no recognisable species, geometry slightly wrong
surface staining of dark residue, surface iridescent in patches
hanging strands of knotted sinew, uneven lengths, asymmetric

label: Reliquary Cross
prompt_fragments: processional cross of gilded copper, patinated at joints
central cavity sealed behind rock-crystal cabochon, cracked
niello-inlaid vine scroll border on each arm face
socket shaft of iron, surface rusted where gilding is lost

label: Power Crystal
prompt_fragments: faceted hexagonal crystal, dense synthetic mineral, fist-sized
interior lit by pulsing energy core, cool cerulean glow
surface planes machine-polished, edges crisp and sharp
metal cradle mount of burnished titanium, four-point grip

label: Lantern
prompt_fragments: four-paned lantern of iron frame and wavy period glass
handle bail of twisted iron, pivot-mounted at crown
oil font visible at base through lower glass pane
surface patina of rust-brown on iron, glass smoke-hazed

label: Brass Compass
prompt_fragments: pocket compass, case of lathe-turned brass, hinged lid
compass rose printed on cream card, iron needle blued-tip
bezel ring of engraved degree marks, hairline index
lid interior engraved with maker's cartouche, ornate serif

label: Alchemist's Kit
prompt_fragments: leather roll-case open to reveal glass vials in sewn loops
corked vials of coloured liquid, amber, green, and cobalt
small bronze mortar and pestle, stained interior
folded parchment label on each vial, inked in cramped script

label: Cyberdeck
prompt_fragments: portable deck of cracked synth-leather over composite shell
flip-up display of scratched smart-glass, amber text overlay
exposed circuit ports along top edge, custom-coloured cable stubs
sticker-tagged housing, graffiti tags and corp-logo removal scars

label: Surveyor's Theodolite
prompt_fragments: precision optical instrument, body of lacquered brass
telescope tube of polished brass, objective lens ringed in black
horizontal and vertical circles of engraved silver, vernier scales
tribrach base of cast iron, levelling screws at three points

label: Field Medkit
prompt_fragments: rigid polymer case, MOLLE-compatible, olive-drab surface
red cross marking on lid, slightly peeling at corner
interior foam-cut for sealed vials, syringes, and trauma dressings
clasp of black nylon webbing, quick-release buckle

label: Pickaxe
prompt_fragments: miners pickaxe, forged iron head, point and adze ends
head surface scale-rough with use, edge corners bright
hickory haft, smooth-worn at grip, grain visible at handle end
shoulder wedge of iron, securing head, surface rusted

label: Treasure Chest
prompt_fragments: domed-lid chest of studded oak, iron corner bands and hasp
padlock of heavy iron, keyhole visible, surface rusted
interior lined with faded red velvet, partially visible
coin and gem scatter at lid edge, gold and jewel tones

label: Supply Crate
prompt_fragments: injection-moulded polymer crate, gunmetal grey, stackable
stencilled unit and contents markings in white, slightly faded
twin butterfly latches of pressed steel, safety-orange tabs
recessed grip handles on short faces, reinforced with polymer

label: Apothecary Jar
prompt_fragments: wide-mouth glass jar, blown glass with slight green tint
cork stopper, yellowed with age, wax-sealed at join
handwritten paper label, ink browned, adhesive failed at corner
contents murky liquid with suspended specimen visible

label: Ammo Box
prompt_fragments: pressed-steel ammunition box, olive-drab paint, stencilled calibre
lid of folded sheet steel, rubber gasket seal at join
wire bail handle, surface-rusted at pivot points
embossed NATO cross on lid face, paint partially chipped

label: Barrel
prompt_fragments: cooperage barrel of staved oak, iron hoops at bilge and head
stave wood grain running vertical, slightly swelled at bilge
bung hole and wooden bung at stave face, iron ring around
surface aged and weathered, iron hoops rust-streaked

label: Steamer Trunk
prompt_fragments: flat-top trunk of canvas-covered wood, slat-reinforced
brass corner fittings and tray latches, tarnished
travel stickers layered on lid, faded and overlapping
tray interior of faded velvet, interior fittings of tarnished brass

label: Ornate Throne
prompt_fragments: high-backed throne of carved oak, gilded relief on crest rail
seat cushion of deep crimson velvet, worn at front edge
armrests carved as lion heads, open-mouthed, gilt-traced
tapered legs on ball-and-claw feet, each surface-gilded

label: Gothic Mirror
prompt_fragments: tall pier glass in tarnished silver frame, tracery spires at crown
mirror surface foxed with age, dark patches at corners
frame of cast iron lacquered black over silver leaf, worn through
base plinth of ebonised wood, carved with skulls, surface dusty

label: Control Console
prompt_fragments: curved console of matte composite, recessed display array
holographic panel projection above console surface, data readout
backlit keyboard of sculpted polymer, alpha-numeric legends
cable management channels at rear, bundled conduits visible

label: Saloon Piano
prompt_fragments: upright piano, case of weathered walnut veneer, panels warped
ivory keys yellowed and chipped at edges, several dropped
brass candle holders at music desk, tarnished and wax-dripped
front panel open revealing hammers of felt, stained

label: War Table
prompt_fragments: heavy oak trestle table, surface scarred and ink-stained
spread parchment map pinned at corners with iron tacks
carved wooden campaign markers scattered at battle-line
candle stubs in iron holders at table corners, wax-pooled

label: War Drum
prompt_fragments: barrel drum of carved oak, rawhide head laced with twisted cord
iron rim band at each end, surface pitted and weathered
painted geometric motif on head face, colours faded
rope tension loops knotted in V-pattern along body

label: Lute
prompt_fragments: eleven-string lute, bowl-back of ribbed maple, deep warm brown
spruce soundboard with carved rose soundhole, delicate fretwork
peg box bent nearly perpendicular, tuning pegs of fruitwood
gut strings aged to cream, bridge of ebonised wood, low profile

label: Ritual Gong
prompt_fragments: suspended boss gong of hammered bronze, patinated green-brown
frame of lacquered red wood, cross-beam carved with cloud motif
silk tassels of gold and black at frame corners, age-frayed
padded mallet of wrapped leather, resting on frame hook

label: Battle Standard
prompt_fragments: square banner of heavy wool, faded crimson field
charge of golden lion rampant, couched in black outline
pole of ashwood, iron point finial at top, butt iron-shod
fabric edge frayed from campaign, several tears partially mended

label: Regimental Colors
prompt_fragments: silk colour, royal blue field with unit battle-honours inscribed
gold fringe at fly edge, frayed at lower corner from service
painted central wreath of laurel, faded and cracked
pike staff of turned wood, crowned finial of gilt metal

label: Clan Sigil Banner
prompt_fragments: tall sashimono banner of undyed white silk, ink-brushed mon
mon design of stylised crane, black brushwork, single bold stroke
crossbar of lacquered bamboo at top, silk tied at four points
vertical pole of lacquered black wood, tapered to copper point
